title: Beacon Report Generated
description: Emitted by Beacon when a KPI/period report is generated and ready for delivery.

kpis.description: Free-form metric map for the reporting period.

period_start.description: ISO 8601 inclusive start of the reporting window.

period_end.description: ISO 8601 exclusive end of the reporting window.

delivery_targets.description: Where the report is delivered (e.g. telegram:1370595013, email:ops@…).
